items.title: Premium disruption recovery initiative Initiative
items.description: Premium disruption recovery initiative Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Trip confidence index and Premium guest lifetime value, anchored in premium revenue quality and operational resilience under disruption and partner complexity and led through Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery.. The quarter concentrates on digital retailing, disruption recovery, premium ancillary conversion, and cargo resilience so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase trip confidence index by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

Increase premium booking conversion rate by strengthening disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce premium guest lifetime value by improving disruption recovery & self-service reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery and removing avoidable workflow friction.

productBricks.change: Extended Disruption Recovery & Self-Service Reaccommodation with richer choice sets and policy-aware self-service recovery.
Extended Trip Companion & Proactive Notifications with recovery prompts, airport guidance, and proactive alert sequencing.
Extended Operational Control Tower with guest-impact prioritization alongside flight risk.
Extended Customer Care & Case Management with disruption-specific queues and context handoff.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced recovery actions and richer disruption visibility in the Guest Mobile App.
Introduced proactive disruption messaging and next-best-action nudges in the Proactive Messaging Layer.
Introduced guest-impact prioritization inside the Network Control Workspace.
Introduced disruption-specific servicing workflows in the Disruption Servicing Workspace.

items.title: Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative Initiative
items.description: Corporate content control and partner continuity initiative Initiative is the quarter's focused investment to move Completion factor and Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight, anchored in premium revenue quality and operational resilience under disruption and partner complexity and led through Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths.. The quarter concentrates on digital retailing, disruption recovery, premium ancillary conversion, and cargo resilience so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase completion factor by strengthening corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease recovery decision cycle time by improving corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.kpi: Irregular operations cost per disrupted flight
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce irregular operations cost per disrupted flight by improving corporate, agency & ndc distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths and removing avoidable workflow friction.

productBricks.change: Extended Corporate, Agency & NDC Distribution with account-aware content controls and cleaner servicing paths.
Extended Partner & Alliance Journey Orchestration with deeper continuity logic for disrupted mixed-carrier itineraries.
Extended Offer, Pricing & Availability Management with stronger offer governance across corporate and partner contexts.
Extended Operational Data, Revenue & Personalisation Platform with account-health and partner-leakage insight.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduced stronger corporate content control and servicing signals in the NDC and Agency API.
Introduced account-health and disruption insight in the Commercial Account Workspace.

discoveryLinks.discoveryName: Corporate content control and partner continuity: operating discovery
